description:
The quiz assesses practical knowledge of AWS storage services, testing familiarity with S3, DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS, ElastiCache, and related best‑practice patterns and pitfalls. It is moderately challenging, using an engaging, informal tone that encourages learners to explore cloud storage concepts while reinforcing key ideas. The style is supportive and slightly humorous, aiming to motivate participants to deepen their AWS expertise.
Topics: Amazon S3, Amazon DynamoDB, Amazon Aurora, Amazon RDS, Amazon ElastiCache, AWS storage best practices, Common cloud storage pitfalls
Audience: Developers, cloud engineers, and IT professionals with basic to intermediate experience in AWS who want to validate and expand their knowledge of storage services.
